textByHash.5e782f059845f0e82c410ab14ba9e47d456038d1: There's plenty of trees around, couldn't you go to another spot?
textByHash.9be56591614b95fc9ed6a80f4961f3bbefe96ed1: It's so peaceful here, don't you agree?
textByHash.ca6b74b358503401fed6806729b56c4b8c28bd0a: Hey! You can't come through here! This is private land!
